title: Offset Blocks
description: Allows you to place blocks that are not on the grid
body:
Allows you to place blocks that are not on the grid

Mod Instructions:  
Press R to select a block you want to place, and press G to place the block that is in your hand one block below you. Do not use on servers because  
A: CHEATING  
B: Just dont do it ok?

Features:
Keybind to open GUI for placing offset blocks at your location
Keybind to place the block in your hand at your location

Datapack Instructions:
